---
title: "Teaching Reproducible Research"
date: 2025-11-25
author: [Lisa DeBruine]
categories: [teaching]
image: ../images/psyteachr.png
image-alt: Rainbos-bordered hexagon with the word PsyTeachR
---

Lisa DeBruine spoke about [PsyTeachR](https://psyteachr.github.io) at the Maths and Stats seminar at the University of Glasgow in Scotland.

[Slides](https://debruine.github.io/talks/teach-repro-2025/)
